## Collections.ReadOnlyConvertingResultMap.get() method

Gets a converted value from the map by key.

**Signature:**

```typescript
get(key: TK): DetailedResult<TTARGET, ResultMapResultDetail>;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type

</th></tr></thead>

key

TK

The key to retrieve.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

[DetailedResult](./ts-utils.detailedresult.md)<!-- -->&lt;TTARGET, [ResultMapResultDetail](./ts-utils.collections.resultmapresultdetail.md)<!-- -->&gt;

`Success` with the converted value and detail `exists` if the key was found, `Failure` with detail `not-found` if the key was not found, or `Failure` with detail `invalid-value` if conversion failed.
